ticket: Can you email me a receipt for our June payment?

ticket: Can you add a way to tag tasks with multiple labels?
notes: New capability request.

ticket: What are your support hours over the holidays?
notes: General service question.

ticket: The submit button text is cut off and overlaps the icon on the checkout screen.
notes: Visible cosmetic defect -> Frontend, Low.

ticket: The exported CSV totals don't match what the dashboard shows.
notes: Wrong calculated data -> Backend.

ticket: The whole platform is returning 503 errors for everyone right now.
notes: Site-wide outage -> DevOps, High.

notes: Enhancement request.

ticket: This is unacceptable and I'm FURIOUS - there's a spelling mistake in your onboarding email.

ticket: I will cancel my plan immediately if you don't add a Kanban board view.

ticket: After logging in I can see another customer's account and their private details.
notes: Data exposure across accounts is a security issue -> High.

ticket: Only my account can't log in - everyone else on my team signs in fine.

ticket: I spent all afternoon writing a report and it vanished right after I clicked save.

ticket: Checkout throws an error and won't complete, and also the help link in your footer is broken.

ticket: The bulk-edit feature errors out, but I can still edit items one at a time.

ticket: The app has been crawling all morning for our entire 200-person organization.

ticket: Your pricing page is a JOKE. Just tell me whether tax is included in the listed price.

ticket: We have an audit Thursday; can you send our data-processing agreement before then?

ticket: We're evaluating competitors and will leave unless you support single sign-on.
notes: Churn threat tied to a missing feature -> Low.

ticket: Clicking 'Add row' does nothing in Firefox, though it works fine in Chrome.

ticket: Our Zapier integration stopped creating records in your app since yesterday.
